core.utils.validators module

VALIDATORS – Check measurement quality (Req 1.46, Req 1.9)

Provides functions to validate energy measurements for quality issues such as: - Negative energy (should not happen) - Thermal throttling (high temperature) - Too few samples - Zero energy

Author: Deepak Panigrahy

class core.utils.validators.MeasurementValidator[source]

Bases: object

Static methods to validate energy measurements.

static validate(measurement: Any) → Tuple[bool, List[str]][source]

Perform all validation checks on a measurement.

Parameters:

measurement – An EnergyMeasurement object (expected to have attributes: package_energy_uj, sample_count, thermal.package_temperature_celsius, etc.)

Returns:

Tuple (is_valid, list_of_issues).
